description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light, neutral fabric, designed for spacious seating. The sofa features deep, plush seat and back cushions that appear loose and generously filled, providing a comfortable and inviting look. A patterned throw blanket is draped over one section, adding a touch of visual interest and texture. The armrests are straight, low, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and maintaining a clean, modern profile. The legs are short and barely visible, giving the sofa a grounded, almost floating appearance. The overall design is contemporary and versatile, suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa with plush, loose cushions and a light fabric upholstery, featuring a modern, low-profile design and a draped patterned throw.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long section of the sofa, highlighting the deep seat cushions and the straight, padded armrest at the end.
description_view_1: Front angled view displaying the full L-shape, the arrangement of all seat and back cushions, and the patterned throw draped over the corner.
description_view_2: Side view of the shorter section, emphasizing the continuous backrest and the throw blanket's placement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backrest alignment and the uniformity of the cushion arrangement along the longer side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple individual seat and back cushions, all loose and uniform in size, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout with a continuous row along each segment.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests, padded and matching the backrest height, with a simple, modern rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs, minimally visible and likely recessed, with a subtle finish that blends with the sofa base.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest with loose, plush cushions of uniform height and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light fabric upholstery with a smooth, matte texture; a single patterned throw blanket adds visual contrast.
